mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tcc_transactions (id, order_id, product_id, quantity, status, try_expire_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{orderId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{status}, #{tryExpireAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, product_id, quantity, status, try_expire_at, confirmed_at, cancelled_at, cancel_reason, created_at, updated_at FROM tcc_transactions WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.update: UPDATE tcc_transactions SET status = #{status}, confirmed_at = #{confirmedAt}, cancelled_at = #{cancelledAt}, cancel_reason = #{cancelReason} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, product_id, quantity, status, try_expire_at, confirmed_at, cancelled_at, cancel_reason, created_at, updated_at FROM tcc_transactions WHERE status = 'TRYING' AND try_expire_at < #{now} LIMIT 100
